Function.Inference: Intro establishes the rhythmic bass and harmonic feel before the main melody.
Main looping body containing the primary thematic and contrasting melodies.
A short turnaround section ending with D.C. to loop back to the beginning.

Section.Inference: Intro section without main thematic material, marked as X.
Section A introduces the primary melodic motif of the theme.
Section B introduces contrasting material before a short reprise of the A motif.
Outro turnaround transitioning back to the start, marked as X.
